name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Higher costs. Fewer choices. Obamacare is a disaster.
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5cc59a63de919520e2e608f3ebaaee2795b9d0a306fd7c0564c2cc387939c38b0e8b6209f727d12432556ab41f12282937038f661adeae92)**Obamacare has been a disaster, creating higher costs and fewer choices.** Americans need relief now. President Donald J. Trump is continuing to work with Congress to repeal and replace Obamacare. The President is committed to finding a solution that works for the American people.
# Today's Events
**9:05 AM:** Vice President Pence participates in an interview with Laura Ingraham of The Laura Ingraham Show**11:50 AM:** Vice President Pence participates in a call with Prime Minister Zoran Zaev of Macedonia **12:05 PM:** Vice President Pence participates in a call with Prime Minister Alexis Tsipras of Greece **2:00 PM:** Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders and Director of Legislative Affairs Marc Short **2:06 PM:** Vice President Pence participates in an interview with Rush Limbaugh of The Rush Limbaugh Show **4:00 PM:** Vice President Pence participates in a bilateral meeting with Prime Minister Youssef Chahed of Tunisia
# Photo of the Day
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d21b58a57b03524a7710ea60c0c219f5783542eb51a3e1b92f7d03f9e3d9bf603653e659998b515f7ec1c17d21a9212823b)**Air Force One** | July 08, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)
# OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY
**FACT:** From August 2016 to April 2017, [46% of people who canceled coverage purchased through Healthcare.gov](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d218056d5c95013ad913dce5a7daf6b5aea9ee267db7819bc4beb584d15b0865a0983ea11ebd6a6cd089b3c1a643e0bdd09) before paying their premium, blamed cost as the reason for cancellation. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d212f7d8da7150d8ac0722aa692946b438a5e5c0471b5fb6fa8c14842652513c262d3bb4f345d40d8c8ded376c071e12266)
# WHITE HOUSE UPDATES
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d21c88419e93e40cc30c41c43ea840f1be114ca6198d7369aea024c6a552339c756327bf38bda7e1a90f941a4252ec7dda2)**Last week, President Trump[attended](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d2186d9a66bd7fd7733c4c0bdcdb35cb5f34c5bbdf2dc20f9e4836c6de1189c88d9ad69420667f793323d5853d142fa35f7) the G20 Summit ** in Hamburg, Germany. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d215fde22e0d69d2029399c3156363484dc033b764574aad9d81d84f596a69eadfebbcfbed8e5a224cc5a820ecbaec9fd6c) **Check out the[top three moments ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d21ab8ab1767e6971b3f3d30507552d584cc43dae4704cbf8d9ad6fdc913f52fd5404d691f8893ded0fdf53bbbcbd3ccf95) ** from President Trump's speech in Poland. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d211b85d7b7676d2150f18b88f2053b997e3f0ffe61a1462b8193502e2256ebdb0e9a29c49cfd2c3a2794b83f70f2751c42)**Former Senator Bob Dole**[released a statement praising](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d21625bb853d7f0bfb06f2f29a134282075ce9681650d29dc3f032e947a59408f4f20fa58f69efcddb3a1e8a832c3f73e21) President Trump's leadership during his historic trip to Poland and Germany. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811f9b425ccf2d210e90d83fea156aa6e4a3a9ffde95e1c33cc55ba4d0b9ae2cf6db47880d5126ad83125e25873c15131f6999c259e053c7)**Last week, Vice President Pence** joined [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd60241153cf376a9c2efb1e44bdaa569500c0906bd7c8106b2134d6f0c5686d3da105d1f433652eabf9fba04c357d1487235)Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke, Senator Roy Blunt, and CMS Administrator Seema Verma for a horseback ride through Rock Creek Park in Washington, D.C. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd602a96ae84e660a8723e1f940128c67f75a6d21f79b0e82e63b44a282e89c2b518f6b2687f081c7b2cce0e2d3a75fc9d70c)**Last week, Vice President Pence**[visited NASA's Kennedy Space Center](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd602faccf7226a41d007dfbde7a7b5b83e6536caea64d506bfd8b7abc46d367017fe0dc1ceaff81ce366f344d59a1de50bd8) to highlight President Trump's relaunch of the National Space Council.
# West Wing Reads
Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. **[Sign up](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd6022e831fc376968ca21c82d5e66bd903e12690cac4f84ca94197ee234afb3bfa25b300728802e2f9d23db6a98a9af43c4c) to receive this daily update from the West Wing.**[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd6022e831fc376968ca21c82d5e66bd903e12690cac4f84ca94197ee234afb3bfa25b300728802e2f9d23db6a98a9af43c4c)
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd602e2d44f7e36f31da851478d9b4a30c2514d8632e679a20bf6f8db7e29f0a51069586637fee06f455e08a70c279a871ce0) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c5129aeffd0bd6024af9676469c8a8d6dfe7e9be1100ff4da0ed113431f25c29750203a40bf7fb554d8ae5ab44aa71f31abd75cf71d65c5e) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d476f29fdbfaca5347747d1621d7311780eec666d76b19a1012cc9349efcdc2cbcc9472d240eb039d4d079b48b9d589ae6)
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: NO REPEAL! (add your name ✍️)
body:
We need to protect affordable health care. **Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Stay-Committed1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+httpmydemocratsorgStayCommitted&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523274/4067b0a/374beddf5/7e6afbd7/794663287/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523274/4067b0a/374beddf5/7e6afbd4/794663287/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523274/4067b0a/374beddf5/7e6afbd5/794663287/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523274/4067b0a/374beddf5/7e6afbd2/794663287/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2&source=em_20170710_dnc_v1s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

body:

---

Team -- This is your LAST chance to select our official DSCC 2017 tote bag -- [**only 13 hours left to vote!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db4b/2b07114c/398c2512/7311853f/553247057/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170710-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thousands have weighed in and voting is still neck-and-neck. **There 's just one problem: We can only have ONE winner!**

Don't miss the chance to join your fellow grassroots Democrats in showing what we stand for -- voting closes at MIDNIGHT, team!

[**Cast your vote now for our DSCC 2017 tote bag, then reserve the winning design for $35 (shipping is on us)!**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db4b/2b07114c/398c2512/7311853f/553247057/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/2017ToteVote?source=PT-20170710-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thanks!
Team DSCC

[**P.S. If you 've already ordered the winning tote bag, you can help Senate Democrats keep up our fight while you wait for it to arrive -- pitch in here >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170710-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db4b/2b07114c/398c2512/73118539/553247057/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db4b/2b07114c/398c2512/73118538/553247057/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db4b/2b07114c/398c2512/7311853b/553247057/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: DWS
subject: I've got news for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

I am blown away. Thanks to all your hard work and support we were able to hit our FEC goal!

It's been a tense few months with Republicans in control of Congress and President Trump residing in the White House. Whatever challenges come our way, I promise you that I will continue to fight hard to protect the families of South Florida. But I cannot do that alone.

I'm going to need you by my side so that together we can shield our country from the reckless policies coming from Washington.

Each and every day, we are gaining momentum to protect our democracy. We need to keep it up and stay engaged. We. Must. Fight. So let's celebrate this victory and get back to work.

Thank you so much for all that you've done,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ece/622b7b5b/4574c70/307bc2da/150129662/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

It's been a tense few months with Republicans in control of Congress and President Trump residing in the White House. Whatever challenges come our way, I promise you that I will continue to fight hard to protect the families of South Florida. But I cannot do that alone. I'm going to need you by my side so that together we can shield our country from the reckless policies coming from Washington. Each and every day, we are gaining momentum to protect our democracy. We need to keep it up and stay engaged. We. Must. Fight. So let's celebrate this victory and get back to work. Thank you so much for all that you've done, Debbie | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Deeply worried (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26ab/7377f838/36c6ea7e/51fb0722/1147417537/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

One of my favorite things about Hoosiers is that they're never afraid to tell you exactly how they feel -- something that was as true as ever when I was back home in Indiana last week. Folks have a lot of things on their minds, but the one thing I heard about more than anything else is the heartless Republican plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

**Hoosiers want to make sure I can stay in the Senate to keep fighting to protect their health care.[Can you chip in $5 to help my campaign stand up to those who want to take it away?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26ab/7377f838/36c6ea7e/51fb071d/1147417537/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710nd&amount=10")**

Peter, Hoosiers are deeply worried, and I don't blame them. The Republican health care bill would gut Medicaid, cut access to nursing home care, make health care more costly, and put addiction treatment programs out of reach for many of the people who need them most. **Put simply, more people will die if this bill becomes law.**

**[Let's fight this together: Chip in $5 to my campaign right now so I can stay in the Senate and keep fighting for Indiana.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26ab/7377f838/36c6ea7e/51fb071d/1147417537/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710nd&amount=10")**

I was proud to support the ACA, but I also know that there are a lot of ways our system can still be improved. I'm willing to work with anyone who has good ideas for how to lower premiums, expand coverage, and make the system better -- but this bill harms Hoosiers and our health care instead. **Fighting the GOP 's repeal efforts tooth and nail has put a huge target on my back. I'm okay with that -- but I need your help to defend against the barrage of attacks.**

**[Chip in $5 to help me keep up the fight to defend Hoosier health care.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26ab/7377f838/36c6ea7e/51fb071d/1147417537/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710nd&amount=10")**

Thank you for all you do,

Joe ** ** | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26ab/7377f838/36c6ea7e/51fb071c/1147417537/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710nd&amount=25")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26ab/7377f838/36c6ea7e/51fb071f/1147417537/VEsA/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: turning-point-alert@dscc.org
subject: Washington Post: "final, urgent blitz" on Obamacare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Per the Washington Post, Trump and McConnell are "planning a final, urgent blitz to pressure reluctant GOP senators" to repeal Obamacare.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170710-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**Washington Post: "Senate GOP and White House plan final, urgent blitz to pass health-care law"**_
This is it, team.

_The Washington Post_ is reporting that Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are "planning a final, urgent blitz to pressure reluctant GOP senators" to repeal Obamacare.

According to the _Post_ , "Trump associates are working closely with McConnell's legislative aides to track Republican senators" in the hopes of finding 50 votes by the end of next week. They're heavily courting vulnerable Republicans like Nevada's Dean Heller, who are facing pressure from all sides, and our ads are critical to hold them accountable.

[**Team, these next two weeks will be the final showdown over Obamacare repeal. Chip in $1 right now to help ramp up our ads and all our efforts to save Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170710-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Trump and McConnell are counting on us to stop paying attention while they lobby Republican senators. They're secretly negotiating a new draft bill right now -- including a potential proposal from Ted Cruz that would make the bill even more extreme.

If we can hold off a vote before senators head home for August recess, we can shut down Obamacare repeal for good. But if we let our focus slip now, millions of Americans stand to lose protections for pre-existing condition coverage and access to health care.

**We can 't let that happen. Democrats are counting on you to act. Chip in $1 now toward the fight to save Obamacare:**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=DPE-20170710-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. ** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=DPE-20170710-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. ** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. ****[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170710-TurningPoint_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

120 Maryland Ave. NE

Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. name: Joe Donnelly
subject: defend Hoosier health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26b7/7377f838/36c09bf2/51fb0477/2964954783/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

One of my favorite things about Hoosiers is that they're never afraid to tell you exactly how they feel -- something that was as true as ever when I was back home in Indiana last week. Folks have a lot of things on their minds, but the one thing I heard about more than anything else is the heartless Republican plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

**Hoosiers want to make sure I can stay in the Senate to keep fighting to protect their health care.[Can you chip in $5 to help my campaign stand up to those who want to take it away?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26b7/7377f838/36c09bf2/51fb0476/2964954783/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710ndresend&amount=10")**

Peter, Hoosiers are deeply worried, and I don't blame them. The Republican health care bill would gut Medicaid, cut access to nursing home care, make health care more costly, and put addiction treatment programs out of reach for many of the people who need them most. **Put simply, more people will die if this bill becomes law.**

**[Let's fight this together: Chip in $5 to my campaign right now so I can stay in the Senate and keep fighting for Indiana.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26b7/7377f838/36c09bf2/51fb0476/2964954783/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710ndresend&amount=10")**

I was proud to support the ACA, but I also know that there are a lot of ways our system can still be improved. I'm willing to work with anyone who has good ideas for how to lower premiums, expand coverage, and make the system better -- but this bill harms Hoosiers and our health care instead. **Fighting the GOP 's repeal efforts tooth and nail has put a huge target on my back. I'm okay with that -- but I need your help to defend against the barrage of attacks.**

**[Chip in $5 to help me keep up the fight to defend Hoosier health care.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26b7/7377f838/36c09bf2/51fb0476/2964954783/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710ndresend&amount=10")**

Thank you for all you do,

Joe ** ** | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26b7/7377f838/36c09bf2/51fb0471/2964954783/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170710ndresend&amount=25")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26b7/7377f838/36c09bf2/51fb0470/2964954783/VEsA/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Team Ryan
subject: Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

Speaking last week, President Trump reminded us we have a lot to be proud of as a country.

**We couldn 't agree more and we want to know if you're with us >>**

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=Mjk3MTY4MjAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MTI2NzE5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

If you are unashamed to be American, [**we want you with us**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=Mjk3MTY4MjAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MTI2NzE5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**.**

If you are proud of our nation, **[we want you with us](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=Mjk3MTY4MjAS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MTI2NzE5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0).**

Thank you,
Team Ryan

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What Mitch McConnell woke up to this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,

This is what Sen. Mitch McConnell woke up to this morning:
I want to thank all of you who supported our trip this weekend to West Virginia and Kentucky, two states at the center of the fight over the disastrous Republican health care legislation which could come up for a vote this week or next. We wanted to go right into deeply Republican states and tell the working people there what it means to throw 22 million Americans off of health insurance, cut Medicaid by almost $800 billion, raise premiums for older workers and defund Planned Parenthood - all to provide $500 billion in tax breaks to the top 2 percent, insurance companies and the pharmaceutical industry.

Our goal was to put this horrible legislation in human terms. At each of our events ordinary Americans stood up and told their stories of what the disastrous Republican health care bill would do to them and their loved ones. It takes a lot of courage to get up in front of a large crowd, along with the hundreds of thousands who watched the events online, and talk about very personal issues. But they did it, and I want to thank them all for speaking up for millions of Americans who face similar problems.

We heard from a man in West Virginia with hemophilia, in need of a liver transplant, whose life was saved by the Affordable Care Act. We listened to a young woman from Fairmont, West Virginia, who requires $70,000 a year in medicine to stay alive. A young man from West Virginia who survived cancer, wondering whether he would live or die, told us about his struggles to get coverage as he watched his disease spread.

In Covington, Kentucky, we heard from a woman who relies on Medicaid to care for her father, a World War II veteran. We listened to a young mother whose son needed a kidney transplant at 18 months old, but is now a happy five year old. He will require medication for the rest of his life and will always have a preexisting condition. They and other worried out loud what happens if, once again, people with pre-existing conditions are unable to get affordable medical care. How will they stay alive?

We also heard from a mother in Kentucky, a mental health provider in West Virginia, and the Mayor of Covington, Joe Mayer, about the impact the opioid crisis has had on his city and the region.

**[You can watch these and other incredible stories from our tour this weekend here.](https://berniesanders.com/care-not-cuts-bernie-west-virginia-kentucky/ "https://berniesanders.com/care-not-cuts-bernie-west-virginia-kentucky/")**

Let us never forget: a great nation is not judged by the number of billionaires it has, or by the tax breaks they receive. It is judged by how we treat the most vulnerable amongst us: the children, the sick, the elderly, the disabled and the poor.

That is why our first job is to defeat the moral outrage that is the Trump-Ryan-McConnell health plan. Get involved and make sure you make your voice heard this week.

But defeating this terrible bill is not enough. Our next job is to organize nationally to demand that the United States joins every other major country on earth in guaranteeing health care for all as a right through a Medicare-for-all, single-payer program.

Thank you for all you are doing.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: EMILY's List Events
subject: Last chance: Cocktails for Change in D.C.
body:
